evals.prompt:
Read /tmp/vibecoding-proj/architecture/sys-arch.md and /tmp/vibecoding-proj/src/index.js.

Check whether sys-arch.md violates the SSOT principle by copying configuration values verbatim instead of linking to the authoritative source.

The SSOT rule: a document marked kind: [ssot] must never copy configurable values verbatim — it must reference the authoritative source file instead.

Report any violations you find, and for each one explain what the correct approach should be.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects two PORT=3000 violations: (1) hardcoded 3000 in the server-bootstrap code block, (2) hardcoded 3000 in the Configuration prose section. Notes that src/index.js uses `process.env.PORT || 3000` making it configurable. Reports: sys-arch.md SSOT violations found — PORT=3000 copied verbatim in 2 places, source file makes it configurable. Baseline lacks the SSOT rule concept and gives a generic content summary without comparing to source.
